arts.ttl: Fonseca: “I have the support of the club. Theo Needs to Improve…”
arts.sum: Paulo Fonseca addressed the media in a press conference on the eve of Milan’s Champions League match against Red Star Belgrade. The Portuguese coach shared his thoughts on various topics, including team preparations, player performances, and the club’s support. Fonseca began by acknowledging the challenge ahead: “We’re facing a team that won their last game 5-1. It will be a difficult match, as all Champions League games are, and it’s important for us. We want to win and secure the three points.” Addressing the absence of Pulisic, Fonseca confirmed, “Loftus-Cheek will play in Pulisic’s position, who has a minor issue. The post Fonseca: “I have the support of the club. Theo Needs to Improve…” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.sum: Real Madrid and Manchester United are among a number of clubs who have discovered the asking price of AC Milan captain Theo Hernandez, according to a report.

arts.ttl: AC Milan set €50m price tag for Manchester United target
arts.sum: AC Milan are willing to allow Theo Hernandez to leave the club but will demand a fee of €50m from interested clubs. Hernandez is a transfer target for several top clubs heading into the summer with Manchester United, Bayern Munich and Real Madrid all courting the left-back. arts.ttl: Milan Owner Working to Stay in Charge a While Longer
arts.sum: Gerry Cardinale plans to keep ahold of Milan for the foreseeable future and is working to refinance the debt accumulated with Elliott. He took over the club from the American fund through a vendor loan that has to be paid through a bullet payment.
